com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless

Interface FelicaCard

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Card, ContactlessCard

    public interface FelicaCard
extends ContactlessCard
    Provides Felica card operations.

    How to create a FelicaCard instance:

         FelicaCard felicaCard = new FelicaCardImpl()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      byte[] polling(byte[] systemCode, byte requestCode, byte timeslot)
      Polling Felica card.
      byte[] polling(byte[] systemCode, byte requestCode, byte timeslot, int timeout)
      Polling Felica card within timeout.
      byte[] transmit(byte[] command)
      Executes APDU command with Felica card.
      byte[] transmit(byte[] command, int timeout)
      Executes APDU command with Felica card with assigned timeout.
      byte[] transmit(byte[] command, int timeout, int retryTimes)
      Executes APDU command with Felica card with assigned timeout.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.card.contactless.ContactlessCard

        activate, deactivate

    • Method Detail

      • transmit

        byte[] transmit(byte[] command)
         throws NSDKException
        Executes APDU command with Felica card.
          Note:
        • No need to activate Felica card.
        • Deactivate card to close RF after communication is finished.
        Parameters:
        command - [Required] APDU command data.
        Returns:
        APDU response data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • transmit

        byte[] transmit(byte[] command,
                int timeout)
         throws NSDKException
        Executes APDU command with Felica card with assigned timeout.
          Note:
        • This interface shall be performed after getting IDmPMm by "openCardReader" or "polling".
        • Timeout is only available in this time, if input 0 means using driver default communication timeout.
        • No need to activate Felica card.
        • Deactivate card to close RF after communication is finished.
        Parameters:
        command - [Required] APDU command data. The command length shall be more than 10 bytes.
        timeout - [Required] APDU timeout.
        Returns:
        APDU response data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • transmit

        byte[] transmit(byte[] command,
                int timeout,
                int retryTimes)
         throws NSDKException
        Executes APDU command with Felica card with assigned timeout. If timeout error occurred and the retryTime is not 0, it will retry the APDU command with the assigned timeout.
          Note:
        • This interface shall be performed after getting IDmPMm by "openCardReader" or "polling".
        • Timeout is only available in this time, if input 0 means using driver default communication timeout.
        • No need to activate Felica card.
        • Deactivate card to close RF after communication is finished.
        Parameters:
        command - [Required] APDU command data. The command length shall be more than 10 bytes.
        timeout - [Required] APDU timeout.
        retryTimes - [Required] Retry times. It shall be >=0.
        Returns:
        APDU response data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • polling

        byte[] polling(byte[] systemCode,
               byte requestCode,
               byte timeslot)
        throws NSDKException
        Polling Felica card.
        Parameters:
        systemCode - [Required] The system code, 2 bytes.
        requestCode - [Required] Designation of request data as follow, which shall be 1 byte.
        timeslot - [Required] Designation of maximum number of slots possible to respond. It can only be 00h, 01h, 03h, 07h, and 0Fh.
        Returns:
        The response data of polling, which consist of (01h + IDmPMm(16 bytes) + request data).
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • polling

        byte[] polling(byte[] systemCode,
               byte requestCode,
               byte timeslot,
               int timeout)
        throws NSDKException
        Polling Felica card within timeout.
        Parameters:
        systemCode - [Required] The system code, 2 bytes.
        requestCode - [Required] Designation of request data as follow, which shall be 1 byte.
        timeslot - [Required] Designation of maximum number of slots possible to respond. It can only be 00h, 01h, 03h, 07h, and 0Fh.
        timeout - [Required] The whole polling timeout. Unit: ms, value range:[0, 5000]. Timeout is only available in this time, if input 0 means using driver default communication timeout.
        Returns:
        The response data of polling, which consist of (01h + IDmPMm(16 bytes) + request data).
        Throws:
        NSDKException
